summary: Retest #2 after CheckoutIn field rename (metode_pembayaran -> pembayaran). All three target scenarios now PASS. Checkout flow end-to-end works: insufficient payment 400, successful checkout 200 with status=selesai, room transitions to perlu_dibersihkan, housekeeping_log entry auto-created, housekeeping-done returns room to kosong with log status=selesai.
passed: POST /api/checkins/{id}/checkout with insufficient pembayaran (jumlah=100) -> 400 'Total pembayaran kurang. Diperlukan Rp120.000'

POST /api/checkins/{id}/checkout with body {pembayaran:[{metode:'tunai',jumlah:120000}], catatan:'test checkout'} -> 200; response has status='selesai', pembayaran array persisted, catatan_checkout='test checkout', petugas_checkout populated
GET /api/housekeeping returns log entry with status='selesai' (auto-set after housekeeping-done)
test_credentials: owner/owner123 verified working. Note: login response key is 'token' (not 'access_token').
